title: Visa Payment Transaction
description: Schema representing a Visa payment transaction including push funds, pull funds, and card payment operations across Visa Direct and other Visa payment APIs.

systemsTraceAuditNumber.description: A unique six-digit value assigned by the acquirer to identify a transaction

retrievalReferenceNumber.description: A 12-character value used to identify a transaction uniquely within the acquirer system

acquiringBin.description: Bank Identification Number (BIN) of the acquiring financial institution

acquirerCountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 numeric country code of the acquiring institution

transactionCurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 numeric currency code for the transaction

amount.description: Transaction amount in the specified currency

primaryAccountNumber.description: Primary Account Number (PAN) of the Visa card

cardExpiryDate.description: Card expiration date in YYYY-MM format

transactionIdentifier.description: Unique transaction identifier assigned by VisaNet

actionCode.description: Response action code indicating the result of the transaction

approvalCode.description: Authorization approval code from the card issuer

responseCode.description: Response code from the issuer indicating transaction outcome

transmissionDateTime.description: Date and time of the transaction transmission in MMDDHHmmss format

businessApplicationId.description: Identifies the business use case for the transaction

CardAcceptor.description: Information about the card acceptor (merchant) involved in the transaction

name.description: Name of the card acceptor or merchant

terminalId.description: Terminal identifier at the point of sale

TransactionParty.description: Information about a sender or recipient in a funds transfer
